meta.description: Triggered exclusively by ApprovalService.dispatchToN8n after an email has been approved (approved_by is set). Sends via the BDE's own connected Gmail account so replies land in their real inbox, then confirms delivery back to the API. This workflow never runs on unapproved content -- the API is the only caller and it validates approval status before invoking the webhook.

nodes.name: Gmail: Send Message
nodes.notesInFlow: Credential is selected dynamically per-mailbox via the fromMailboxUserId -> credential mapping maintained in n8n Credential Vault (see docs/architecture.md Gmail Integration section).

nodes.name: Compute HMAC
nodes.notesInFlow: Must hash the exact same JSON string sent as the callback body so the API's HMAC check (see apps/api/src/middleware/webhookAuth.ts) matches.

nodes.name: Callback: Send Failed
nodes.notesInFlow: Connected to the error output of Gmail: Send Message via n8n's built-in error workflow branch.
